commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fa1b96b31bc6fc00cc63736707dc9081b3643a83)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Telegram stale spool recovery's final claim-to-pending rename in ENOENT/EEXIST handling and adds a colocated regression test.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +32. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can observe a .processing entry and then throw ENOENT from the final recovery rename if another drain path removes it before handoff. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human handling because contributor proof is insufficient and maintainers must choose between this branch and the overlapping PR; automation should not request repair markers while the external proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix(telegram): handle ENOENT race in spool drain recovery rename
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
